Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Judith Hehir for Susana Wassmer (Petitioner)

Ms. Hehir stated that the couple did the refinance themselves, that Mrs. Wassmer did not understand she was giving up her interest in the property, they thought everything was considered community property between the parties, and the significance of signing the grant deed from community property to separate property was not explained or understood by the couple. The Court noted that this is posthumous estate planning, and there is an ultimate consequence to gain commercial benefit with the loan. Ms. Hehir also asked the Court to consider the 49er tickets, a timeshare, and that there are no objections to this petition. The Spousal Property Petition is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Continued To May-01-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
